title: Philo Vance Returns
writer: S.S. Van Dine, Robert E. Kent
actors: William Wright, Vivian Austin, Leon Belasco
plot: Playboy Larry Blendon (Damian O'Flynn) introduces his grandmother Stella Blendon (Clara Blandick) to his fiancee, radio singer Virginia Berneaux (Ramsay Ames). Despite Larry's record of broken romances and divorces, Virginia decid...
